title: Playbook - Power BI Paginated Reports And Report Builder
applies_to: Pixel-precise report design and export scenarios

confirmed_facts.fact: Paginated reports are optimized for printing and sharing, can render all rows across as many pages as necessary, and are authored with Power BI Report Builder.
Power BI Report Builder is the standalone authoring tool for paginated reports that are later published to the Power BI service.

With a free license, users can publish paginated reports to My Workspace; publishing to other workspaces requires Pro or PPU and at least a contributor role in the workspace, and Build permission on the dataset is required.
Power BI service list view can create a paginated report from an existing Power BI report or dataset by choosing Create paginated report.
Paginated report data design begins with data sources and datasets; each dataset has a query and each data region expands as needed to display the dataset results.
Microsoft guidance recommends paginated reports for print-ready, PDF-oriented, precision-layout, and operational reporting scenarios where interactive Power BI report pages are not the right fit.

workflow_sequence: Choose paginated reports when the output must print cleanly, export as a document, or preserve exact layout across pages.
Author the .rdl report in Power BI Report Builder.
Define data sources, datasets, parameters, and report layout in Report Builder.
Preview locally and verify pagination, formatting, and export behavior.
Publish to My Workspace or a shared workspace in the Power BI service, subject to license and workspace-role requirements.
Share, embed, or automate exports only after the paginated output is stable.
implementation_notes: Use paginated reports for invoices, statements, forms, compliance-ready output, and large tabular exports.
Do not force a standard Power BI interactive report to behave like a print document if the business requirement is document-first.
When a user asks for PDF-ready output, exact page headers and footers, or full-table export fidelity, route to Report Builder and paginated reports first.
Treat paginated reports and standard Power BI reports as complementary artifacts, not interchangeable ones.
caveats: Paginated reports are a different authoring and layout model from Power BI Desktop report pages.
Interactive exploratory analytics is usually better served by standard Power BI reports than by paginated reports.
License, workspace role, and dataset Build permission can block otherwise valid paginated-report designs.
